recommendations.title: Marshland
recommendations.overview: The Spanish Deep South, 1980. A series of brutal murders of adolescent girls in a remote and forgotten town bring together two disparate characters – both detectives in the homicide division – to investigate the cases.

recommendations.title: Prison 77
recommendations.overview: Modelo Prison. Barcelona, 1977. A young accountant, awaiting trial for embezzlement with a possible 20 years sentence, joins a group of prisoners demanding amnesty.

recommendations.title: The Legend of the Chupacabras
recommendations.overview: Leo San Juan and his team of "ghostbusters" continue with their adventures, this time fighting against the mexican monster himself: "El Chupacabras".

recommendations.title: The Legend of the Guanajuato Mummies
recommendations.overview: Three friends confront a horde of mummies, who have inexplicably awakened, and try to rescue their pal, not realizing they have fallen into a trap.

recommendations.title: The Legend of La Llorona
recommendations.overview: Based on a famous Mexican legend, a group of kids must stop the ghost of a woman whose guilt over the drowning of her own children leads her to abduct youngsters who wander the woods at night.

recommendations.title: Unit 7
recommendations.overview: Angel, a young intelligent and kind, aims to be a police inspector. Rafael  instead  is an expeditious, forceful and arrogant policeman. Meanwhile, Miguel and Mateo are part of Group 7, a group of rogue cops ready to do anything to achieve their goal

recommendations.title: Ozzy
recommendations.overview: Ozzy, a friendly, peaceful beagle has his idyllic life turned upside down when the Martins leave on a long and distant trip. There's only one problem: no dogs allowed! Unable to bring their beloved Ozzy along for the ride, they settle on the next bes

recommendations.title: The Legend of the Black Charro
recommendations.overview: After releasing the Chupacabras, Leo San Juan decides that it is time to return together with his brother Nando to his grandmother's house. Halfway down the road, Charro Negro manages to confuse Leo and because of him, an innocent girl is dragged int

recommendations.title: Dallas Buyers Club
recommendations.overview: Loosely based on the true-life tale of Ron Woodroof, a drug-taking, women-loving, homophobic man who in 1986 was diagnosed with HIV/AIDS and given thirty days to live.

recommendations.title: The Courier
recommendations.overview: Cold War spy Greville Wynne and his Russian source try to put an end to the Cuban Missile Crisis.
